aboutSection.title: About BTB Global Trading
aboutSection.body: BTB Global Trading is an EU-based company headquartered in Warsaw, Poland. We coordinate access to regulated financial infrastructure through licensed partners — working with importers, exporters, corporate finance teams, and private clients across regulated markets. We help move capital with control, clarity, and speed. Transactions are carried out by licensed financial partners.

points.fastSecureTransactions: Flexible Structuring for Real Operational Needs

hero.title: ABOUT US
hero.description: BTB Global Trading is a privately held European company headquartered in Warsaw, Poland. We provide access to regulated financial infrastructure through a network of licensed partners. Our role is to coordinate, support, and simplify complex cross-border financial operations. We help companies and private clients connect with trusted financial partners, manage operational complexity, and ensure global capital flows happen efficiently and in full compliance.

hero.title: What We Deliver
hero.subtitle: BTB supports companies with real operational exposure across multiple countries, payment rails, and currencies. We bring clarity, control, and execution to the financial side of international trade — so your team can move quickly, stay aligned with compliance, and reduce friction in day-to-day settlements.

globalPayments.title: Global Payments
globalPayments.body: Cross-border settlements executed through regulated channels. We support multi-currency B2B payments across key trade corridors in Europe, Latin America, the Middle East, and Asia — structured through licensed, regulated financial partners.
bullets: Multi-currency settlements (EUR, USD, GBP, ILS, TRY, AED, BRL, MXN, CNY, and more).
B2B supplier and operational payments with reliable tracking and documentation readiness.
Same-day / next-day execution in many corridors.
Payment structuring aligned to regulated processes and operational realities.

fxTreasury.title: FX Execution & Treasury Coordination
fxTreasury.body: Better currency execution, timing, and control across jurisdictions. We help finance teams manage currency flows efficiently — whether you need reactive execution for immediate obligations or proactive planning to reduce exposure.
bullets: FX conversion execution with clear visibility into how the conversion is structured.
Hedging support through partner solutions (where available and appropriate).
Treasury timing and cash-flow planning across currencies and pay dates.
Custom structuring for deal-specific requirements (split payments, staged settlements, multi-party flows).

tradeSupport.title: Trade & Deal Support
tradeSupport.body: Execution support for the operational details most platforms don't handle. Many problems in cross-border finance aren't payment problems — they're coordination, documentation, and timing problems. We help you manage the execution layer around international trade payments.
bullets: Counterparty and supplier screening support (risk and compliance-oriented checks, where applicable).
Document pack review for operational readiness (invoices, supporting documents, settlement flow).
Multi-party coordination across stakeholders and jurisdictions.
Currency exposure planning tied to timelines, deliverables, and settlement milestones.

hero.title: BTB Global Trading
hero.subtitle: Your Trusted Partner in International Trade and Payments
hero.body1: BTB Global Trading supports international trade finance coordination and cross-border payment operations, headquartered in Warsaw, Poland. Our mission is to simplify complex global workflows and help businesses execute efficiently across markets.
hero.body2: With deep understanding of global corridors and regulatory environments, our team supports importers, exporters, and international operators with tailored coordination and execution support through licensed partners.
hero.body3: We prioritize long-term relationships built on clarity and trust. At BTB Global Trading, seamless cross-border payments and operational trade support are core to enabling global business.

touch.title: Get in Touch
touch.subtitle: Request a call or message us on WhatsApp to discuss your markets, currencies, timelines, and settlement requirements.
